_description: Reproduction fixture for Q3.6-6 (tool-definition envelope unwrap). The `tools` list carries a definition wrapped in the OpenAI envelope `{"type": "function", "function": {...}}`. Upstream Qwen3.6 emits the whole envelope via `tool | tojson`, so the `"function":` wrapper key appears in the rendered <tools> block. With Q3.6-6, the envelope is unwrapped to the inner function spec (mirroring the tool-CALL-site unwrap already in the template), so the wrapper key is gone and the inner spec is emitted at top level.
_bug: Upstream <tools> loop does `tool | tojson` with no unwrap, unlike the tool-CALL site which already unwraps `tool_call.function`. Prior art: jscott3201 gist e4b15588 (patch Q5); convention from Qwen/Qwen3-Coder-Next.
